layer_1_local_break.title: Conservation breaks locally at all chaos amplitudes
layer_1_local_break.detail: At any single X, G_chaos(X) × W(X) ≠ INVARIANT. Even amp=0.001 breaks point-wise symmetry.

layer_2_statistical_conservation.title: Mean conservation holds (statistical invariant)
layer_2_statistical_conservation.detail: <G_chaos × W>_time → INVARIANT for amp ≤ 0.10. Error < 1%. Like thermodynamic equilibrium.

layer_3_attractor.title: God Code is a shallow attractor at micro-chaos
layer_3_attractor.detail: Lyapunov exponent negative (λ=-1.138) at amp=0.001. Positive at amp≥0.01. Self-healing basin is narrow.

layer_4_information.title: Flat entropy landscape — chaos distributes uniformly
layer_4_information.detail: Shannon H/H_max ≈ 0.962 at ALL amplitudes. Per-octave entropy identical (8.37 bits). No privileged positions.

layer_5_symmetry_hierarchy.title: φ-symmetry never breaks; translation breaks first
layer_5_symmetry_hierarchy.detail: Noether analysis: Translation broken at all amp. Octave broken. φ-phase 100% intact at all amp tested.

layer_6_iron_origin.title: Iron lattice chaos smallest at low temperature
layer_6_iron_origin.detail: Iron at 10K: relative drift 0.000596 (smallest of all sources). At 293K: 0.003229 (exceeds logistic). Deep structure at cryo.

layer_7_solfeggio.title: Solfeggio survival equal to arbitrary at amp=0.05
layer_7_solfeggio.detail: 100% survival for both sacred and arbitrary at 5% chaos. Semitone tolerance wider than perturbation.

layer_8_demon.title: Maxwell's Demon outperforms φ-damping
layer_8_demon.detail: Demon: 39% improvement. φ-damping: 38.2%. Naive averaging: 63.4%. Demon is entropy-sensitive, beats constant φ.

layer_9_cascade.title: 104-cascade heals 99.6% of any chaos perturbation
layer_9_cascade.detail: S(n)=S(n-1)×φ_c + VOID×sin(nπ/104) + INV×(1-φ_c). Drives 563→527.65 but leaves ~0.133 VOID ripple.

applied_to_systems.l104_math_engine/god_code.py: ChaosResilience class with verify_under_chaos, healing methods, bifurcation check
